author: saumyaphor4252
body:
#### PR description:

This PR fixes the long-standing issue of the drop in trigger efficiency observed in the Z  ee samples at  700-1000 GeV for Phase 2 electron trigger paths. The results were presented at the HLT Upgrade Meeting today, and more details regarding the issue, fix, validation, and PR can be found in [1].

To summarize here the issue: `HLTEgammaGenericFilter` (instance of `HLTGenericFilter`) was wrongly being used in the Phase2 EGM trigger paths with the expected behavior of `HLTEgammaGenericQuadraticFilter`  or `HLTEgammaGenericQuadraticEtaFilter`. This had observable physics implications for the trigger paths, with positive energy-dependent thresholds `E/E2>0`, because of which we saw the dip. 

The PR:
1. Updates all the instances of  `HLTEgammaGenericFilter` in the Phase2 EGamma triggers with `HLTEgammaGenericQuadraticFilter`
   1.  For `E/E2>0` --> Affected with physics implication for the 13 triggers listed in [2] (changes 24 `cfi` modules)
   2.  For  `E/E2=<0` --> Unaffected triggers, but mainly for cleanup and to avoid confusion in future (changes 44 `cfi` modules)

3. Adds the following small note at the top of `HLTGenericFilter` to avoid confusion for future developers
   1.  `Note: The module allows to specify a cut/selection of the form: < X || < Y/E || < Z/E2`
   
The PR is currently split into 3 different commits, based on the above-mentioned 3 changes, which can be later squashed if needed. 

[1] https://indico.cern.ch/event/1669270/contributions/7017401/subcontributions/607977/attachments/3255069/5810168/EGM_HLT_Upgrade_Inefficiency_Checks_14.04.2026.pdf


[2]
1. `HLT_DoubleEle23_12_Iso_L1Seeded`
2. `HLT_DoubleEle25_CaloIdL_PMS2_L1Seeded`
3. `HLT_DoubleEle25_CaloIdL_PMS2_Unseeded`
4. `HLT_Diphoton30_23_IsoCaloId_L1Seeded`
5. `HLT_Diphoton30_23_IsoCaloId_Unseeded` 
6. `HLT_Ele115_NonIso_L1Seeded`
7. `HLT_Ele26_WP70_L1Seeded`
8. `HLT_Ele26_WP70_Unseeded`
9. `HLT_Ele32_WPTight_L1Seeded`
10. `HLT_Ele32_WPTight_Unseeded`
11. `MC_Ele5_Open_L1Seeded`
12. `MC_Ele5_Open_Unseeded`
13. `HLT_Ele30_WPTight_L1Seeded_LooseDeepTauPFTauHPS30_eta2p1_CrossL1`

#### PR validation:

Physics validation of the trigger efficiency performance for all affected electron trigger paths by the PR is in [1] above; expect similar performance for photon trigger paths as well. 

#### If this PR is a backport please specify the original PR and why you need to backport that PR. If this PR will be backported please specify to which release cycle the backport is meant for:

Backport may be needed for this fix to be included in the upcoming Phase2 sample production
title: Fix for Phase2 HLT Egamma trigger inefficiency dip
